revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿九]][[zh:七月廿九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿九]][[zh:七月廿九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿九]][[zh:七月廿九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿九]][[zh:七月廿九]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 29|qq=July 29}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kashō|en|Kashō|qid=Q1373157|lt=Kashō|1=Kashō}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|848|en|848|qid=Q30380|lt=848|1=848}} {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}} ) – A massive lightning strike occurred in {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|qid=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō|1=Heian-kyō}} , causing damage to the offices of the {{ill|Mokkōryō|ja|木工寮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mokkōryō|1=Carpentry Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11518380}} and {{ill|Higashi Ichishi|ja|東市司|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi Ichishi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 市司|1=City Offices (Tōji and Sai)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11480073}} , as well as to the residences of {{ill|Kayō Prince|ja|賀陽親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayō Prince|1=Kaya-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11634959}} , {{ill|Minamoto Sadateru|ja|源定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto Sadateru|1=Minamoto no Sadamu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11564052}} , {{ill|Fujiwara Harutsu|ja|藤原春津|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Harutsu|1=Fujiwara no Hartsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623310}} , and others (''{{ill|Shoku Nihon Kōki|en|Shoku Nihon Kōki|qid=Q1041301|lt=Zoku Nihon Kokki|1=Shoku Nihon Kōki}} ''). * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunji|1=Bunji (era)}} 2nd Year (leap July) ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1186|en|1186|qid=Q19730|lt=1186|1=1186}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}} ) – The beloved consort of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qid=Q310445|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}} , {{ill|Shizuka Gozen|en|Shizuka Gozen|qid=Q3088217|lt=Shizugosho|1=Shizuka Gozen}} , gave birth to a son who was later drowned on the orders of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|頼朝|lt=Yoritomo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoritomo|qq=}} . * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|qid=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō|1=Eikyō}} 12th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} ) – During the {{ill|Yūki War|en|Yūki War|qid=Q11606564|lt=Yūki Campaign|1=Yūki War}} , {{ill|Uesugi Kiyokata|ja|上杉清方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Kiyokata|1=Q11359220|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11359220}} besieged {{ill|Yūki Castle|ja|結城城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yūki Castle|1=Yuki Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11606565}} in {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}} ({{ill|Yūki, Ibaraki|en|Yūki, Ibaraki|qid=Q847569|lt=Yūki City|1=Yūki, Ibaraki}} ). * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1532|en|1532|qid=Q6436|lt=1532|1=1532}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} ) – Due to disasters such as warfare, the era was changed from {{ill|Kyōroku|en|Kyōroku|qid=Q1193418|lt=Kyōroku|1=Kyōroku}} to {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} . * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|August 28|en|August 28|qid=Q2817|lt=August 28|1=August 28}} ) – In Kyoto, {{ill|Tosa Domain|en|Tosa Domain|qid=Q1189704|lt=Tosa Domain|1=Tosa Domain}} 's {{ill|Nakaoka Shintarō|en|Nakaoka Shintarō|qid=Q3138626|lt=Nakaoka Shintarō|1=Nakaoka Shintarō}} organized the ground support unit ({{ill|Rikuen-tai|ja|陸援隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rikuen-tai|1=Rikuentai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11658626}} ) of the anti-shogunate rōshi army. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|September 13|en|September 13|qid=Q2848|lt=September 13|1=September 13}} ) – In Tianjin, the {{ill|Sino-Japanese Friendship and Trade Treaty|en|Sino-Japanese Friendship and Trade Treaty|qid=Q701091|lt=Treaty of Peace and Amity|1=Sino-Japanese Friendship and Trade Treaty}} was signed.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1625|en|1625|qid=Q6826|lt=1625|1=1625}} {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Mitsutomo|en|Tokugawa Mitsutomo|qid=Q843245|lt=Tokugawa Mitsutomo|1=Tokugawa Mitsutomo}} , the 2nd lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|en|Owari Domain|qid=Q1062072|lt=Owari Domain|1=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1700|en|1700|qid=Q6813|lt=1700|1=1700}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 13th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1728|en|1728|qid=Q6947|lt=1728|1=1728}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munemoto|en|Tokugawa Munemoto|qid=Q843627|lt=Tokugawa Munekan|1=Tokugawa Munemoto}} , the 5th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} (died {{ill|1766|en|1766|qid=Q7669|lt=1766|1=1766}} ). * {{ill|Culture|en|Culture|qid=Q11042|lt=Bunka|1=Culture}} 9th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1812|en|1812|qid=Q6933|lt=1812|1=1812}} {{ill|September 4|en|September 4|qid=Q2855|lt=September 4|1=September 4}} ) – {{ill|Asano Nagamichi|en|Asano Nagamichi|qid=Q11557433|lt=Asano Naganori|1=Asano Nagamichi}} , the 11th lord of the {{ill|Hiroshima Domain|en|Hiroshima Domain|qid=Q1141203|lt=Hiroshima Domain|1=Hiroshima Domain}} (died {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1846|en|1846|qid=Q7640|lt=1846|1=1846}} {{ill|September 19|en|September 19|qid=Q2896|lt=September 19|1=September 19}} ) – {{ill|Mitsukuri Rinsho|en|Mitsukuri Rinsho|qid=Q3022381|lt=Minisaku Rinshō|1=Mitsukuri Rinsho}} , a bureaucrat and legal scholar (died {{ill|1897|en|1897|qid=Q7847|lt=1897|1=1897}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku|1=Shōryaku}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|993|en|993|qid=Q24080|lt=993|1=993}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Masanobu|en|Minamoto no Masanobu|qid=Q3314711|lt=Minamoto no Masanobu|1=Minamoto no Masanobu}} , progenitor of the {{ill|Uda Genji|en|Uda Genji|qid=Q4846201|lt=Utagon clan|1=Uda Genji}} (born {{ill|920|en|920|qid=Q24857|lt=920|1=920}} ). * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Jishō|1=Jishō}} 3rd Year (leap July) ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1179|en|1179|qid=Q19698|lt=1179|1=1179}} {{ill|September 2|en|September 2|qid=Q2857|lt=September 2|1=September 2}} ) – {{ill|Taira no Shigemori|en|Taira no Shigemori|qid=Q1184985|lt=Taira no Shigemori|1=Taira no Shigemori}} , a military commander and son of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |Taira no Kiyomori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|qq=}} (born {{ill|1138|en|1138|qid=Q19606|lt=1138|1=1138}} ). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1661|en|1661|qid=Q7005|lt=1661|1=1661}} {{ill|August 23|en|August 23|qid=Q2821|lt=August 23|1=August 23}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorifusa|en|Tokugawa Yorifusa|qid=Q1133680|lt=Tokugawa Yorifusa|1=Tokugawa Yorifusa}} , the 1st lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} and the eleventh son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (born {{ill|1603|en|1603|qid=Q6735|lt=1603|1=1603}} ).<ref>{{Citation|和書|editor=勝浦市史編さん委員会|title=勝浦市史 通史編|year=2006|page=406|qq=}} </ref>
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|28|7|30|6|29|8|7|0729|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 7월 29일]] [[ja:7月29日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:七月廿九]]
[[ar:July 29 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月廿九]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月廿九]] {{wikidata link|Q840052}} [[Category:Days 29 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar July]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
